member.name: T:EvmHook
member.summary:
Definition of a lambda EVM hook.

This class represents a hook implementation that is programmed in EVM bytecode and can access state or interact with external contracts. It includes the hook specification and any initial storage updates.

member.name: M:EvmHook.#ctor(ContractId)
member.summary: Create a new EvmHook with no initial storage updates.

member.name: M:EvmHook.#ctor(ContractId,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{EvmHookStorageUpdate})
member.summary: Create a new EvmHook with initial storage updates.
member.param: the initial storage updates for the lambda

member.name: M:EvmHook.FromProtobuf(Proto.EvmHook)
member.summary: Create a EvmHook from a protobuf message.

member.name: M:EvmHook.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Convert this EvmHook to a protobuf message.

member.name: P:EvmHook.StorageUpdates
member.summary: Get the initial storage updates for this lambda.
member.returns: an immutable list of storage updates
